# Netscape HTTP Cookie File
# https://curl.se/docs/http-cookies.html
# This file was generated by Get cookies.txt LOCALLY extension
#
# ATTENTION: This is a placeholder file!
# Replace this file with real cookies from your Instagram session.
#
# How to get real cookies:
# 1. Install "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY" extension in Chrome
# 2. Go to https://www.instagram.com and login
# 3. Click extension icon -> Export
# 4. Save as cookies/instagram.txt
#
# Example format (your real cookies will look different):
.instagram.com	TRUE	/	TRUE	1817154681	sessionid	YOUR_SESSION_ID_HERE
.instagram.com	TRUE	/	TRUE	1817154681	csrftoken	YOUR_CSRF_TOKEN_HERE
.instagram.com	TRUE	/	TRUE	1790370684	ds_user_id	YOUR_USER_ID_HERE
.instagram.com	TRUE	/	TRUE	1814130684	ig_did	YOUR_IG_DID_HERE
.instagram.com	TRUE	/	TRUE	1817154681	mid	YOUR_MID_HERE
